title: indulgent norwegian brie fritters
description: crispy fried brie balls coated in a sweet coconut-cream-crack batter, perfect for a decadent snack or dessert
instructions: In a blender or food processor, puree the chilled coconut cream until smooth.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and salt.
Add the sugar, flour, and salt mixture to the blender with the coconut cream and blend until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk.
Add the egg mixture to the blender and blend until smooth.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the batter to chill.
When ready to fry, heat about 2-3 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat until it reaches 350°F.
Using a cookie scoop or spoon, drop the chilled batter by tablespoonfuls into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for about 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Repeat the process with the remaining batter, being careful not to overcrowd the pan.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy!
